name: GlobeNewswire Press Release Distribution API
what_it_does: GlobeNewswire press release distribution REST API for investor relations, corporate communications, and PR teams to distribute news releases to financial media, journalists, and wire services with regulatory compliance support for SEC filings. Enables AI agents to manage press release submission and distribution for corporate communications automation, handle financial news distribution to Bloomberg, Reuters, and AP for investor relations automation, access SEC Edgar-compatible distribution for regulatory filing automation, retrieve distribution confirmation and media pickup tracking for PR measurement automation, manage multimedia press release with images, video, and documents for rich media PR automation, handle embargo management and timed release for coordinated news distribution automation, access industry and geographic targeting for segmented media distribution automation, retrieve press release performance analytics for PR ROI automation, manage news monitoring and media coverage tracking for brand intelligence automation, and integrate GlobeNewswire with PR platforms, CRM, and investor relations software for end-to-end corporate communications automation.
use_cases: Distributing earnings releases from investor relations automation agents
Filing SEC-compatible news from regulatory compliance agents
Distributing product news from corporate PR automation agents
Tracking media pickup from PR measurement agents
not_for: Social media publishing (use Hootsuite or Later for social distribution)
Internal corporate communications (use Slack, Teams, or intranet tools)
Consumer PR without corporate/financial news requirements
best_when: A public company's investor relations team or corporate communications team wanting AI agents to automate SEC-compliant press release distribution, financial news distribution to major wire services, and media coverage tracking through GlobeNewswire's distribution network.
avoid_when: SEC REG FD SIMULTANEOUS DISTRIBUTION COMPLIANCE: SEC Regulation FD requires simultaneous broad distribution of material non-public information; automated press release scheduling must verify distribution reaches newswires and public simultaneously without selective pre-release; automated embargo systems that release to wire services before public channels create Reg FD violation. EDGAR DISTRIBUTION CONFIRMATION vs SEC FILING: GlobeNewswire distribution does not constitute SEC filing; automated investor relations workflow must distinguish newswire distribution from actual SEC Edgar filing; automated distribution via GlobeNewswire without separate Edgar filing creates investor disclosure without regulatory filing compliance. EDITORIAL REVIEW PROCESSING TIME FOR TIME-SENSITIVE NEWS: GlobeNewswire editorial review for some release types can delay distribution; automated news distribution for time-sensitive announcements must account for editorial review window; automated embargo release at exact market-open time requires editorial pre-clearance before embargo time.

auth.notes: GlobeNewswire uses API key and OAuth for distribution integrations. REST API with JSON. Part of Notified (West Technology Group). Oslo, Norway HQ (North American operations from Chicago). West Corporation acquired GlobeNewswire from Nasdaq in 2018. Notified platform integrates GlobeNewswire with PR software. Distribution: Bloomberg, Reuters, Associated Press, 650+ news outlets, 170+ countries. Financial wire service with SEC-compatible distribution. GDPR. Competes with PR Newswire (Cision) and Business Wire (Berkshire) for financial press release distribution.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-release pricing based on distribution circuit and geographic reach; subscription plans for high-volume users; custom enterprise pricing for IR teams
pricing.notes: West Technology / Notified. Per-release pricing. Geographic circuit-based pricing. Annual contracts for enterprise IR teams.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; distribution submissions throttled; no webhook push — distribution status via polling

known_agent_gotchas: DISTRIBUTION STATUS POLLING REQUIRED (NO WEBHOOKS): GlobeNewswire does not provide webhooks for distribution completion notification; automated PR workflow must poll distribution status endpoint to confirm wire pickup; automated campaigns that assume instant distribution completion may proceed before release reaches all wire service endpoints

EMBARGO TIMESTAMP PRECISION FOR REGULATORY COMPLIANCE: GlobeNewswire embargo systems require precise timestamp specification for Reg FD compliance; automated earnings release distribution must set embargo to exact market-open time in target timezone; off-by-one-hour errors from timezone mishandling in automated embargo scheduling creates pre-market release Reg FD exposure

MULTIMEDIA ATTACHMENT FORMAT AND SIZE LIMITS: GlobeNewswire multimedia press releases have specific image format (JPG/PNG), resolution, and file size limits by distribution tier; automated press release generation with attached assets must validate format compliance before submission; automated submission of non-compliant media creates editorial rejection delaying time-sensitive distribution

GEOGRAPHIC CIRCUIT SELECTION FOR COST OPTIMIZATION: GlobeNewswire pricing varies by geographic distribution circuit (US, Europe, global); automated press release submission without circuit selection defaults to broadest (most expensive) distribution; automated IR workflow should implement circuit selection logic based on announcement type and target investor geography

NOTIFIED PLATFORM vs LEGACY GLOBENEWSWIRE API: GlobeNewswire is integrated into the broader Notified platform; some API access points are through legacy GlobeNewswire endpoints while others are through Notified unified platform API; automated integration must verify which API version is active for the specific capability being automated
agent_readiness.security_notes: Financial news distribution. SEC Reg FD, GDPR. API key/OAuth. US/EU. Press release and IR distribution data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial PR distribution. SEC Reg FD, GDPR. API key/OAuth. US/EU. Press release and distribution data.
